2026-04-01T14:05:10.4003768Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-01T14:05:10.4004505Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-01T14:05:10.4004880Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-01T14:05:10.4005188Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-01T14:05:10.4005420Z [36;1m[0m

2026-04-01T14:05:10.4006190Z [36;1m{[0m
